title: Ransomware Exposure - RiskSense
content:
The ransomware exposure playbook reveals an organization's exposure to the specific vulnerabilities that are being exploited to launch ransomware attacks.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the RiskSense pack (RiskSense, partner-supported).

Outputs — RiskSense.RansomwareCves: List of ransomware CVEs, including threats and vulnerabilities.; RiskSense.RansomwareTrendingCves: List of trending (Last 7 days) ransomware CVEs, including threats and vulnerabilities.; RiskSense.HostFinding: List of host finding details.; RiskSense.Host: List of host details..

Integrations/scripts used: DisplayCVEChartScript, IsIntegrationAvailable, RiskSenseGetRansomewareCVEScript, risksense-get-hosts.

      operator:
        simple: EXACT
      page: {}

      value:
